meaning: n.片,补缀,碎片,斑纹,斑点,小块地,眼罩,傻瓜;vt.修补,补缀,掩饰,平息
examples: We can patch up those holes.
He had a black patch over one eye.
Our dog has a bald patch on its leg.
Because of the way they are designed, a simple software patch for one could disrupt others.
They're used in medicine to inject liquids, patch skin and to stimulate acupuncture points.
